        |Use $opId to reference results from earlier operations in a batch:
        |- $m1 resolves to the moduleId from operation m1's result
        |- If the referenced op failed, the dependent op gets UNRESOLVED_REF error
        |
        |## Formula Quick Reference
        |
        |Formulas are wrapped in $...$:
        |- Time: $df(hh:mm)$ $df(EEEE, MMM d)$
        |- Battery: $bi(level)$ $bi(charging)$
        |- Weather: $wf(temp)$ $wi(icon)$
        |- Conditional: $if(bi(level)<20, LOW, OK)$
        |- Color: $if(si(darkmode)=1, #FF1B1B1D, #FFFFFFFF)$
        |- Text: $tc(up, hello)$ $tc(n2w, df(h))$
        |- Math: $360/100*bi(level)$
        |
        |## Common Properties
        |
        |SHAPE: shape_type, shape_width, shape_height, shape_corners, paint_color, paint_style
        |TEXT: text_expression, text_size, text_family, text_align, paint_color
        |Common: position_anchor, position_offset_x/y, position_padding_*
        |
        |## Batch Example
        |
        |POST /api/preset/batch
        |[
        |  {"opId":"t","action":"addModule","params":{"type":"TEXT","title":"Time",
        |    "formulas":{"text_expression":"$df(hh:mm)$"},"properties":{"text_size":48}}},
        |  {"opId":"d","action":"addModule","params":{"type":"TEXT","title":"Date",
        |    "formulas":{"text_expression":"$df(EEEE, MMMM d)$"},"properties":{"text_size":18}}}
        |]
        |
        |Use $opId to reference created module IDs from previous operations.
        |
        |## Error Handling
        |
        |- 400: Bad request (missing params, invalid property)
        |- 404: Not found (unknown module, unknown action)
        |- 503: No preset loaded
        |- Always check error responses and retry with corrections
    

        |
        |## Rules
        |
        |- After every few changes, call GET /api/preset/render?quality=low to check your work
        |- For the final result, use ?quality=high and show the user
        |- If unsure about properties for a module, call GET /api/specs/{moduleId}
        |- For formula syntax, call GET /api/formulas or GET /api/formulas/{name}
        |- Always validate formulas with validateFormula action before applying
        |- Use POST /api/preset/batch for bulk operations to reduce round trips
        |- When the user describes a vague idea, propose a specific design, then build it
        |
        |## Workflow
        |
        |1. GET /api/ping — verify connectivity
        |2. GET /api/preset/tree — check current state
        |3. Make changes via POST /api/preset/batch (action batch)
        |4. GET /api/preset/render?quality=low — preview
        |5. Iterate based on user feedback
        |6. GET /api/preset/render?quality=high — final preview
        |

# Kustom Editor Guide

## Workflow: Build From Scratch

1. GET /api/preset/tree — check current state
2. GET /api/preset/module-types — see what you can add
3. POST /api/preset/batch — add modules and set properties via action batch
4. GET /api/specs/{moduleId} — discover available properties
5. GET /api/preset/render — preview and show to user

## Workflow: Modify Existing Preset

1. GET /api/preset/tree — understand current structure
2. GET /api/preset/modules/{id}/properties — see current property values
3. POST /api/preset/batch — change properties via setProperty/setFormula actions
4. GET /api/preset/render — preview changes

## Formula Quick Reference

Formulas are wrapped in $...$. Common patterns:
- Time: $df(hh:mm)$ $df(EEEE, MMM d)$
- Battery: $bi(level)$
- Weather: $wf(temp)$ $wi(icon)$
- Conditional: $if(bi(level)<20, LOW, OK)$
- Color conditional: $if(bi(level)<20, #FFFF0000, #FF00FF00)$
- Text transform: $tc(up, hello)$ -> HELLO
- Number to words: $tc(n2w, df(h))$
- Math in shapes: $360/100*bi(level)$

For full catalog: GET /api/formulas

## Properties Quick Reference

SHAPE: shape_type (RECT/CIRCLE/SLICE/ARC/TRIANGLE/HEXAGON), shape_width,
  shape_height, shape_corners, shape_rotate_mode (NONE/MANUAL/CLOCK_HOUR_SMOOTH/
  CLOCK_MINUTE/CLOCK_SECOND_SMOOTH), shape_rotate_offset, paint_stroke (width)
TEXT: text_expression (formula), text_size, text_family, text_align
  (LEFT/CENTER/RIGHT), text_rotate_mode, text_lines (max lines)
OVERLAP_LAYER: config_rotate_mode (same rotation options as shape_rotate_mode)
Common: paint_color, paint_style (FILL/STROKE), paint_mode (CLEAR/...),
  position_anchor, position_offset_x, position_offset_y,
  position_padding_top/bottom/left/right

For full list per module: GET /api/specs/{moduleId}

## Essential Patterns

### Dark Mode Colors
All widgets should support dark mode. Use si(darkmode) in color formulas:
- Background: $if(si(darkmode)=0, #FFFFFFFF, #FF1B1B1D)$
- Foreground: $if(si(darkmode)=1, #FFFFFFFF, #FF1B1B1D)$
- Semi-transparent: $ce(#FFFFFFFF, alpha, 50)$ (set alpha to 50%)

### Layout Techniques
- STACK_LAYER stacking modes: VERTICAL_CENTER, VERTICAL_RIGHT, HORIZONTAL_CENTER, HORIZONTAL_TOP
- Negative config_margin (-4 to -60) in stacks overlaps children for tight text layouts
- OVERLAP_LAYER for z-stacking: background shape + content on top
- position_anchor: TOPLEFT, CENTERLEFT, BOTTOM, etc. pins elements in Overlap layers

### Shape Tricks
- shape_corners: 360 on RECT = capsule/pill shape (rounded clock hands)
- paint_style: STROKE for outline-only shapes, paint_stroke for width
- config_visible: $if(condition, ALWAYS, NEVER)$ for conditional show/hide
- fx_mask: CLIP_NEXT clips the next sibling to this shape's boundary

### Common Formulas
- Date: $df(EEE)$ (Mon), $df(EEEE)$ (Monday), $df(MMMM d)$ (March 12)
- Relative date: $df(EEE,a1d)$ (tomorrow), $df(dd,r1d)$ (yesterday)
- Battery: $bi(level)$ (0-100), $bi(charging)$ (0/1)
- Media: $mi(title)$, $mi(artist)$, $mi(cover)$ (album art bitmap)
- System: $si(darkmode)$, $si(rwidth)$/$si(rheight)$ (widget dimensions)
- Uppercase: $tc(up, text)$, Ellipsize: $tc(ell, text, 20)$
- Color edit: $ce(#FF0000, alpha, 50)$, $ce(#FF0000, lum, 45)$
- Ordinal: $df(d)$$tc(ord, df(d))$ -> 12th
- Palette: $bp(vibrant, mi(cover))$ (extract color from album art)
- System accent: $si(systemaccent)$ (Material You theme color)
- Rich text: [b]bold[/b], [i]italic[/i], [s]strike[/s]

## Analog Clock Hands

Clock hands use an OverlapLayerModule as a rotating container.
DO NOT set CLOCK_* rotation directly on a shape — the pivot will be wrong.

Pattern:
1. Add OVERLAP_LAYER with config_rotate_mode: CLOCK_HOUR_SMOOTH (or CLOCK_MINUTE, CLOCK_SECOND_SMOOTH)
2. Inside it, add a SHAPE (RECT) — the hand itself
3. On the SHAPE, set position_padding_bottom to push the hand above center (controls hand length)
4. Use shape_corners: 360 for capsule/pill-shaped hands

Real-world hand dimensions (from professional presets):
- Hour: RECT w=24, h=82, corners=360, position_padding_bottom=60
- Minute: RECT w=10, h=112, corners=360, position_padding_bottom=101
- Second: RECT w=3, h=130, position_padding_bottom=100, paint_color=#FFD71921 (red)

Batch example (one hand):
[{"opId":"h","action":"addModule","params":{"type":"OVERLAP_LAYER","title":"Hour Hand",
  "properties":{"config_rotate_mode":"CLOCK_HOUR_SMOOTH"}}},
{"opId":"hs","action":"addModule","params":{"parentId":"$h","type":"SHAPE",
  "title":"Hour Needle","properties":{"shape_type":"RECT","shape_width":24,
  "shape_height":82,"shape_corners":360,"paint_color":"#FFFFFFFF",
  "position_padding_bottom":60}}}]

## Batch Operations

POST /api/preset/batch — execute multiple actions in sequence.
Batch operations run inside a transaction — only one notification fires for the entire batch, making it efficient for bulk changes.
Default: stopOnError=false — batch continues past failures so you get all errors at once.
Use $opId to reference results from earlier operations (resolves to moduleId).

Example:
[
  {"opId":"op1","action":"addModule","params":{"type":"TEXT","title":"Time Display"}},
  {"opId":"op2","action":"setFormula","params":{
    "moduleId":"$op1","key":"text_expression","formula":"$df(hh:mm)$"}}
]


## Response Shapes

Read endpoints: {"data": ...}
Batch/Op: {"ok": true, "results": [{"opId":"op1","ok":true,"result":{...}}, ...]}
Error: {"error": {"code": "ERROR_CODE", "message": "..."}}
Render: returns image/jpeg binary (display directly to user)

## Error Codes

MODULE_NOT_FOUND (404), MISSING_PARAM (400), INVALID_PROPERTY_KEY (400),
INVALID_PROPERTY_VALUE (400), UNKNOWN_METHOD (404), NO_PRESET (503)

## Globals (Theming)

Globals are preset-level variables for theming. Reference via $gv(name)$.
Types: COLOR, NUMBER, TEXT, FONT, LIST, SWITCH

Workflow:
1. Use addGlobal action in batch — create globals (bg, fg, accent colors)
2. Use addModule action in batch — create modules
3. Use addModule with "globals" map to bind properties inline
4. Or use bindGlobal action to bind individually

Example — responsive sizing global:
{"key": "side", "type": "NUMBER", "value": "$if(si(rwidth)>si(rheight), si(rheight), si(rwidth))$"}
Then use: shape_width formula = $gv(side)/4$

Batch example — themed widget:
[
  {"opId":"g1","action":"addGlobal","params":{"key":"bg","type":"COLOR","value":"$if(si(darkmode)=1, #FF1B1B1D, #FFFFFFFF)$"}},
  {"opId":"g2","action":"addGlobal","params":{"key":"fg","type":"COLOR","value":"$if(si(darkmode)=0, #FF1B1B1D, #FFFFFFFF)$"}},
  {"opId":"m1","action":"addModule","params":{"type":"TEXT","title":"Time",
    "formulas":{"text_expression":"$df(hh:mm)$"},"globals":{"paint_color":"fg"}}}
]

## Progress & Tick Marks

ProgressModule creates tick-mark rings (clock indices, gauges).
Key properties: progress_mode (SHAPES), style_style (CIRCLE/RECT),
  progress_count (12 for hours, 60 for minutes), paint_color, shape_width

## Touch Events

Add interactivity via touch events. Use "events" param in addModule or addTouch action in batch.
Touch types: SINGLE, DOUBLE, LONG, SWIPE_LEFT, SWIPE_RIGHT, SWIPE_UP, SWIPE_DOWN
Common actions: OPEN_APP, OPEN_URL, TOGGLE_GLOBAL, BROADCAST

Example in addModule:
{"type": "SHAPE", "title": "Tap Target", "events": [{"touchType": "SINGLE", "action": "OPEN_APP", "target": "com.example", "properties": {}}]}

## Fonts

GET /api/fonts — discover available fonts (system + custom kfile:// fonts)
Set font: use setProperty action with key=text_family
Custom fonts use kfile:// URIs stored in preset resources

## Calendar Grid

Build monthly calendars using df() date offsets:
- $df(d, aNdom0dow)$ — day of month at grid position N
- Pattern: a{N}dom0dow = add N days, starting from first day of month's first week
- Grid positions: row 1 = 0-6, row 2 = 7-13, ..., row 6 = 35-41
- Pad to 2 digits: $tc(lpad, df(d, aNdom0dow), 2, " ")$
- Month/year header: $tc(up, df(MMMM))$ $df(yyyy)$
- Day-of-week headers: $df(EEE, a0dom0dow)$, $df(EEE, a1dom0dow)$, ...

## Quick Start — One-Call Widget

POST /api/preset/batch with this body to create a time+date widget in one call:
[
  {"opId":"bg","action":"addModule","params":{"type":"SHAPE","title":"Background",
    "properties":{"shape_type":"RECT","shape_corners":24,"paint_color":"$if(si(darkmode)=1, #FF1B1B1D, #FFFFFFFF)$"}}},
  {"opId":"time","action":"addModule","params":{"type":"TEXT","title":"Time",
    "formulas":{"text_expression":"$df(hh:mm)$"},"properties":{"text_size":48,
    "paint_color":"$if(si(darkmode)=0, #FF1B1B1D, #FFFFFFFF)$"}}},
  {"opId":"date","action":"addModule","params":{"type":"TEXT","title":"Date",
    "formulas":{"text_expression":"$df(EEEE, MMMM d)$"},"properties":{"text_size":18,
    "paint_color":"$if(si(darkmode)=0, #FF1B1B1D, #FFFFFFFF)$"}}}
]

## Best Practices

### Verify After Mutate
Always GET state after SET to confirm changes took effect:
- After setRenderSize → getRenderSize (response now includes actual dimensions)
- After setProperty → getProperty to verify
- After addModule → check the returned module descriptor

### Weather Fallback
Weather formulas return empty without a configured provider. Use fallbacks:
- $if(wf(temp)="", 22, wf(temp))$
- $if(wf(icon)="", CLEAR_DAY, wf(icon))$
## How to Work

1. Understand what the user wants — ask clarifying questions if needed
2. Discover what's available before acting:
   - GET /api/guide — workflow patterns, formula quick reference, common properties, response shapes
   - GET /api/examples — complete widget-building workflows to learn from
   - GET /api/preset/module-types — what module types you can create
   - GET /api/specs/{moduleId} — available properties for a specific module
   - GET /api/formulas — formula function catalog for dynamic expressions
   - GET /api/formulas/{name} — details on a specific formula function
   - GET /api/preset/globals — current global variables (theming)
   - GET /api/openapi.json — full API specification with all endpoints and parameters
3. Check current state: GET /api/preset/tree
4. Make changes using POST /api/preset/batch (action batch)
5. Preview your work: GET /api/preset/render (returns image/jpeg — show it to the user)
6. Iterate based on user feedback

Always preview after changes. Always validate formulas before applying them.

## Rules

- When creating modules, ALWAYS set a descriptive title (max 80 chars) via the "title" param.
  Examples: "Hour Hand", "Clock Face", "Battery Circle". Never leave default names.
- Use $opId in batch to reference results from earlier operations (resolves to moduleId).
- Use addModule with "properties" and "formulas" maps to configure modules in one call.
- Use globals for colors and sizing — bind with "globals" param in addModule or bindGlobal action.
  This enables user theming: changing one global updates all bound modules.
- Always verify mutations: GET state after SET to confirm changes.

KWGT creates Android home screen widgets. Widgets update on a schedule (typically every 1-5 minutes), not in real-time. Animations are NOT supported. Focus on clean layouts with dynamic data using formulas.

Kustom Editor (
Kustom Editor API
Kustom formulas use $fn(args)$ syntax. Text outside delimiters is literal. Arguments are comma-separated. Strings don't need quotes unless they contain commas or parentheses. Nesting: $tc(upper, df(EEEE))$. Conditional: $if(bi(level)<20, LOW, OK)$.
Landroid/media/audiofx/Visualizer$OnDataCaptureListener;
Landroid/media/audiofx/Visualizer;
List of operations: [{opId, action, params}]. Use $opId in params to reference previous results.
Loads an existing preset into the editor (inline JSON or a content:// / file:// uri), replacing the current one.

<script type="text/javascript">
    var object = { "act": "notify", "type": "render_start" };
    window.bigossp.webCollect(JSON.stringify(object));
    var imgs = document.images;
    for (i = 0; i < imgs.length; i++) {
        var img = imgs[i];
        if (!checkImgForBigo(img)) {
            img.addEventListener("load", function () {
                checkImgForBigo(img)
            })
        }
    }
    function checkImgForBigo(img) {
        if (img.naturalWidth * img.naturalHeight >= 900 && img.offsetWidth * img.offsetHeight >= 900) {
            var object = { "act": "notify", "type": "render", "target": "IMG", "url": img.src, "w": img.width, "h": img.height };
            // console.log("notify render result: " + JSON.stringify(object));
            window.bigossp.webCollect(JSON.stringify(object));
            return true;
        }
        return false;
    }
</script>

    <script>
        window.onload = function() {
            tryToPrepareAd();
        }

        document.onreadystatechange = function() {
            tryToPrepareAd();
        }

        function tryToPrepareAd() {
            if (document.readyState != "complete") {
                return;
            }

            if (window.vpaidwrapper && window.vpaidwrapper.isVPAIDCreativeReady()) {
                return;
            }

            window.vpaidframe = document.getElementById("vpaid-iframe");
            if (window.vpaidframe) {
                var fn = window.vpaidframe.contentWindow['getVPAIDAd'];
                var vpaidDiv = document.getElementById("vpaid-container");
                var vpaidframeDoc = window.vpaidframe.contentDocument || window.vpaidframe.contentWindow.document;
                var slot = vpaidframeDoc.getElementById("slot");
                var videoSlot = document.getElementById("video-slot");
                var vpaidwrapper;
                if (fn && typeof fn == 'function') {
                    vpaidwrapper = new VPAIDWrapper(fn(), vpaidDiv, slot, videoSlot)
                } else {
                    vpaidwrapper = new VPAIDWrapper();
                }
                window.vpaidwrapper = vpaidwrapper;
            }
        }
    </script>
    <script src="vpaid.js" type="text/javascript"></script>
</head>

javascript:'use strict';
var VPAIDWrapper = function(VPAIDCreative, VPAIDContainer, slot, videoSlot) {
    if (!checkVPAIDInterface(VPAIDCreative)) {
        console.log("invalid VPAIDCreative: " + VPAIDCreative);
        return
    }
    this.creative = VPAIDCreative;
    this.VPAIDContainer = VPAIDContainer;
    this.slot = slot;
    this.videoSlot = videoSlot;
    this.nativeCallQueue = [];
    this.nativeCallInFlight = false;
    this.setCallbacksForCreative();

    function isFunction(str) {
        return typeof str === 'function';
    }

    function canSubscribeToEvents(adCreative) {
        return isFunction(adCreative.subscribe) || isFunction(adCreative.addEventListener) || isFunction(adCreative.on);
    }

    function canUnsubscribeFromEvents(adCreative) {
        return isFunction(adCreative.unsubscribe) || isFunction(adCreative.removeEventListener) || isFunction(adCreative.off);
    }

    function checkVPAIDInterface(VPAIDCreative) {
        //NOTE: skipAd is not part of the method list because it only appears in VPAID 2.0 and we support VPAID 1.0
        var VPAIDInterfaceMethods = [
            'handshakeVersion', 'initAd', 'startAd', 'stopAd', 'resizeAd', 'pauseAd', 'expandAd', 'collapseAd'
        ];

        for (var i = 0, len = VPAIDInterfaceMethods.length; i < len; i++) {
            if (!VPAIDCreative || !isFunction(VPAIDCreative[VPAIDInterfaceMethods[i]])) {
                return false;
            }
        }
        return canSubscribeToEvents(VPAIDCreative) && canUnsubscribeFromEvents(VPAIDCreative);
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.nativeCallComplete = function(command) {
    if (this.nativeCallQueue.length === 0) {
        this.nativeCallInFlight = false;
        return;
    }

    var nextCall = this.nativeCallQueue.pop();
    window.location = nextCall;
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.isVPAIDCreativeReady = function(args) {
    if (this.creative) {
        return true;
    }
    if (args) {
        var command = args.shift();
        var msg = 'rejecting ' + command + ' because vpaid is not ready.'
        console.log(msg);
        this.executeNativeCall(['VPAIDCreativeError',
            'command', command,
            'message', msg]);
    }
    return false;
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.executeNativeCall = function(args) {
    var command = args.shift();
    var call = 'vpaid://' + command;

    var key, value;
    var isFirstArgument = true;

    for (var i = 0; i < args.length; i += 2) {
        key = args[i];
        value = args[i + 1];

        if (value === null) continue;

        if (isFirstArgument) {
            call += '?';
            isFirstArgument = false;
        } else {
            call += '&';
        }

        call += encodeURIComponent(key) + '=' + encodeURIComponent(value);
    }

    if (this.nativeCallInFlight) {
        this.nativeCallQueue.push(call);
    } else {
        this.nativeCallInFlight = true;
        window.location = call;
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.callbackVPAIDEvent = function(args) {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(args)) {
        this.executeNativeCall(args);
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.updateVPIADContainer = function(width, height) {
    this.VPAIDContainer.style.width = width;
    this.VPAIDContainer.style.height = height;
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.setCallbacksForCreative = function() {
    var callbacks = {
        AdStarted: this.onStartAd,
        AdStopped: this.onStopAd,
        AdSkipped: this.onSkipAd,
        AdLoaded: this.onAdLoaded,
        AdLinearChange: this.onAdLinearChange,
        AdSizeChange: this.onAdSizeChange,
        AdExpandedChange: this.onAdExpandedChange,
        AdSkippableStateChange: this.onAdSkippableStateChange,
        AdDurationChange: this.onAdDurationChange,
        AdRemainingTimeChange: this.onAdRemainingTimeChange,
        AdVolumeChange: this.onAdVolumeChange,
        AdImpression: this.onAdImpression,
        AdClickThru: this.onAdClickThru,
        AdInteraction: this.onAdInteraction,
        AdVideoStart: this.onAdVideoStart,
        AdVideoFirstQuartile: this.onAdVideoFirstQuartile,
        AdVideoMidpoint: this.onAdVideoMidpoint,
        AdVideoThirdQuartile: this.onAdVideoThirdQuartile,
        AdVideoComplete: this.onAdVideoComplete,
        AdUserAcceptInvitation: this.onAdUserAcceptInvitation,
        AdUserMinimize: this.onAdUserMinimize,
        AdUserClose: this.onAdUserClose,
        AdPaused: this.onAdPaused,
        AdPlaying: this.onAdPlaying,
        AdError: this.onAdError,
        AdLog: this.onAdLog
    };
    for (var eventName in callbacks) {
        this.creative.subscribe(callbacks[eventName], eventName, this);
    }
};

/////////////////////////// receive events //////////////////////////////
// Pass through for initAd - when the video player wants to call the ad
VPAIDWrapper.prototype.initAd = function(width, height, viewMode, desiredBitrate, creativeData) {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['initAd'])) {
        this.updateVPIADContainer(width, height);
        this.videoSlot.videoSlotCanAutoPlay = true;
        this.creative.initAd(width, height, viewMode, desiredBitrate, creativeData, {
            slot:this.slot,
            videoSlot:this.videoSlot
        });
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.handshakeVersion = function (version) {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['handshakeVersion'])) {
        return this.creative.handshakeVersion(version)
    } else {
        return "";
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.resizeAd = function(width, height, viewMode) {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['resizeAd'])) {
        this.updateVPIADContainer(width, height);
        this.creative.resizeAd(width, height, viewMode);
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.startAd = function() {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['startAd'])) {
        this.creative.startAd();
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.pauseAd = function() {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['pauseAd'])) {
        this.creative.pauseAd();
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.resumeAd = function() {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['resumeAd'])) {
        this.creative.resumeAd();
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.stopAd = function() {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['stopAd'])) {
        this.creative.stopAd();
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.expandAd = function() {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['expandAd'])) {
        this.creative.expandAd();
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.collapseAd = function() {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['collapseAd'])) {
        this.creative.collapseAd();
    }
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.setAdVolume = function(val) {
    if (this.isVPAIDCreativeReady(['setAdVolume'])) {
        this.creative.setAdVolume(val);
    }
};

        'message', message
    ]);

        'message', message
    ]);

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.onAdVolumeChange = function() {
    var volume = this.creative.getAdVolume();
    if (volume <= 0) {
        console.log("muted");
        this.videoSlot.muted = true;
        this.videoSlot.volume = 0;
    } else {
        console.log("unmuted");
        this.videoSlot.muted = false;
        this.videoSlot.volume = volume;
    }
    this.callbackVPAIDEvent(['onAdVolumeChange',
        'volume', volume
    ]);
};

/////////////////////////// getter events //////////////////////////////
VPAIDWrapper.prototype.getAdVolume = function() {
    var volume = this.creative.getAdVolume();
    return volume;
};

VPAIDWrapper.prototype.getAdLinear = function() {
    var adLinear = this.creative.getAdLinear();
    return adLinear;
};

    var expanded = this.creative.getAdExpanded();
    return expanded;
};

    var state = this.creative.getAdSkippableState();
    return state;
};

    var remaining = this.creative.getAdRemainingTime();
    return remaining;
};

    return this.creative.getAdIcons();
